title: Command Mobile Stage Stack
summary: Bounded the phone-sized Command workspace so the active lane detail, lane selector, and atlas map behave like compact game layers instead of one tall forced-scroll pile.

stageModel.mobileBehavior: The active lane detail remains first, the lane rail becomes a shorter internal selector, and the atlas map becomes a compact 220px tactical layer.
stageModel.desktopBehavior: The desktop Command stage remains unchanged with the wide detail stage, compact rail, and supporting map all aligned at 640px.
stageModel.motionBehavior: Existing stage scan, rail pips, and map motion stay intact while the smaller viewport makes them feel like focused HUD layers.

verification: In-app browser QA on command deck Chronicle route at 390x844 and 1440x900
